allow: PowerShell($runs = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/HussamKayed/arabic-coding-shorts/actions/runs"; $run = $runs.workflow_runs[0]; "run: $\($run.name\) #$\($run.run_number\) -> $\($run.status\)/$\($run.conclusion\)"; $jobs = Invoke-RestMethod $run.jobs_url; foreach \($j in $jobs.jobs\) { "JOB: $\($j.name\) -> $\($j.conclusion\)"; foreach \($s in $j.steps\) { "  step: $\($s.name\) -> $\($s.conclusion\)" } })
